/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libboost_plugin_loader_example_plugin.so -o libboost_plugin_loader_example_plugin.so CMakeFiles/boost_plugin_loader_example_plugin.dir/plugin.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/tetripick/UR10_Pick_ws/ros2_ws/build/boost_plugin_loader: ../libboost_plugin_loader.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.83.0 -ldl
